label: Gap-1 reveal (do the experts agree?) — deck-faithful version
method: ux_metrics.js (HTML color) + SVG-fill-aware contrast/size pass; beats 7 (focus) and 12 (all-foods) measured
notes: Standalone SVG-heavy reveal. The stock collector reads CSS `color`, but SVG text paints via `fill`, so contrast was re-measured against computed `fill` vs --paper (#fffdf8). Whitespace/Hick/economy/focal not computed this pass.

contrast_wcag.anchor: any AA failure = 0; now 0 failures on beats 7 and 12

typography_size.note: rotated food-name labels raised 10.5px -> 12px; nothing below the floor

size_tap_targets.note: prev/next nav buttons 34x32 < WCAG 44x44 (suite-wide; not yet fixed)

still_open: Slide-5 'whole-wheat-bread-alone-first' beat (clip 08 structural) — not yet built (needs the food-name/box layer split).
Focus-scene label declutter (clips 05-06): IQR/range labels now readable but still crowd the system leader lines.

judgment_notes.breathing_room: not computed this pass; beat 12 is a dense 20-box chart but fits the viewport
judgment_notes.narrative_clarity: covered separately by the naive-viewer judge (17/24) and deck-fidelity judge (23/24)

top_fixes_done.fix: Added a verdict legend so the colours decode (clip-12).
Neutral box fill darkened (#d9dbd9 -> #c2c7c2) so it reads distinct from uncertain (clip-11).

top_fixes_remaining.fix: Declutter the focus-scene IQR/range labels vs the system leaders (clips 05-06).
